system.label: Booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Stop taking room and day-stay bookings only on Messenger — see which dates are taken and confirm guests from one calendar.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive website only (amenities, gallery, about, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Email from FB About: newvarh@gmail.com. Website-only ₱15k; admin sample priced separately. Ask before send.

sources.address: Maly-Maarang Road, Brgy. Maly, San Mateo, Rizal
sources.notes: Provincial list: 176 Marang St. Brgy. Maly, San Mateo. HD assets from FB Photos — hero 960×720, logo 960×960, gallery up to 1080×1080.
